_comment: sArthI known issues and troubleshooting FAQ. Queried by sar-answer for setup/auth/integration questions.

issues.title: msgraph skill asks for login every Wibey session
symptoms: Microsoft browser login prompt appears on every new Wibey session
mail.ts returns: Token refresh failed. Run: bun auth.ts login
issues.root_cause: auth.ts stores tokens in ~/.wibey/msgraph_tokens.json but the Wibey platform saves the initial OAuth token to ~/.wibey/.oauth_access_token.json (different file, different format — no expires_at field). When msgraph_tokens.json is absent, auth.ts treats the session as unauthenticated.
fix: Run sar-setup — Step 3 now auto-migrates .oauth_access_token.json → msgraph_tokens.json
issues.permanent_fix: sar-setup Step 3 handles migration automatically on every run

issues.title: ServiceNow session expired / 401 on CRQ operations
issues.root_cause: ServiceNow cookies expire after ~8 hours. The session file must be refreshed via Playwright browser automation (Walmart AD SSO).
fix: Automatic: sarthi-snow-auth MCP tool refresh_session handles this — called automatically by sar-crq on 401
issues.permanent_fix: sarthi-snow-auth MCP auto-refreshes on next tool call after session_expired

issues.title: Airflow MCP returns session_expired
issues.root_cause: Airflow session cookies expire. sarthi-airflow-auth handles refresh via headless Playwright.
fix: Call mcp__sarthi-airflow-auth__refresh_session then retry the failed tool
issues.permanent_fix: sar-investigate and sar-resolve skills call refresh_session automatically on session_expired

issues.title: sarthi MCP servers missing from mcp.json
issues.root_cause: setup.sh not run, or mcp.json was reset by a Wibey update.
fix: Then restart Wibey to reload MCP servers
issues.permanent_fix: setup.sh is idempotent — safe to re-run anytime

issues.title: bigquery-explorer skill missing or SDK not installed
symptoms: BQ queries fail with skill not found
issues.root_cause: bigquery-explorer is not bundled by default — must be installed via skill-installer. SDK must also be installed separately via install-bigquery.sh.
fix: Or run sar-setup — Steps 2 handles both automatically
issues.permanent_fix: sar-setup Step 2 auto-installs skill and SDK on every run

issues.title: msgraph browser login blocks cron / non-interactive sarthi runs
symptoms: cron invocation of wibey --prompt freezes waiting for browser input
auth.ts login opens a Playwright browser window that never closes in headless environment
sarthi-msgraph MCP returns: {"error": "auth_expired"} in scheduled runs
issues.root_cause: The msgraph Wibey skill's auth.ts login command opens a browser via Playwright for Microsoft OAuth. In cron or non-interactive environments there is no display/user to complete the login flow — the process hangs forever. The old sar-inbox STEP 2 called auth.ts login on token expiry, which caused this hang.
fix: Run /msgraph login ONCE interactively in a Wibey session to generate ~/.wibey/msgraph_tokens.json
The sarthi-msgraph MCP (server.py) auto-refreshes tokens via the Microsoft refresh_token endpoint — no browser needed after first login
If sarthi-msgraph returns auth_expired in a cron run, it means the refresh token itself has expired (90-day Microsoft limit). Log in once interactively to reset.
issues.permanent_fix: sarthi-msgraph MCP never calls auth.ts login. On auth failure it returns {"error": "auth_expired"} and exits cleanly. Skills check for this error and surface it without blocking.
